data.name: Lenna

weaponImprint.name: Löwenjunges
weaponImprint.trait: When dealing damage, for each debuff on the target, ignores 5% of its defense, up to 20%.
weaponImprint.effect: When applying [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d], deal additional fixed damage equal to 9%/12%/15%/18%/21%/25% of attack, along with a 15%/20%/25%/30%/35%/50% chance to apply [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] for 1 turn.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Increase damage dealt to Varjagers by 2.5%. If the target has [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887], increases the damage dealt by an additional 2.5%.

data.effects: A cheerful and friendly Doll that devotes all her energy to protecting her beloved family. As Lenna becomes more composed, she displays a perfect smile when communicating with others and even gives "forced" hugs to her family.

skills.name: Territory Awareness
skills.description: Selects 1 target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack.

skills.name: King's Authority
skills.description:
Lenna is immune to the negative effects of Electric tiles.

When an enemy unit is inflicted with [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d], gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

After dealing targeted damage, generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles within 1 tile around the target for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Lenna is immune to the negative effects of Electric tiles.

When an enemy unit is inflicted with [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d], gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

For every 3 points of Confectance Index consumed, reduces the cooldown of all skills by 1 turn.

After dealing targeted damage, generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles within 1 tile around the target for 2 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Lenna is immune to the negative effects of Electric tiles.

When an enemy unit is inflicted with [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d], gains 1 point of Confectance Index.

For every 3 points of Confectance Index consumed, reduces the cooldown of all skills by 1 turn.

After dealing targeted damage, generates [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles within 1 tile around the target for 2 turns.

Increases the duration of [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0|doll:lenna] by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Accumulate and consume 3 points of Confectance Index to reduce the skill cooldown by 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: The duration of [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0|doll:lenna] increases by 1 turn.

skills.name: Wild Extinction
skills.description:
Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 140% of attack to them.

If the user's Confectance Index is greater than or equal to 3 points before skill activation, consumes 3 points of Confectance Index to enhance the skill, increasing damage dealt by 30%.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Electric damage equal to 140% of attack to them.

If the user's Confectance Index is greater than or equal to 3 points before skill activation, consumes 3 points of Confectance Index to enhance the skill, increasing damage dealt by 50%. If the target has [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d], gains 3 points of Confectance Index after the attack.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increases the skill’s damage by 20%. If the target has [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d], gains 3 points of Confectance Index after the attack.

skills.name: Leaping Pursuit
skills.description:
Selects a tile within a cross-shaped area of 3 tiles and lands on it. Applies [effect:b9073189-1cd1-448b-a919-1643318ef423] to the nearest enemy target within 7 tiles for 1 turn and deals Physical damage equal to 30% of attack. This can be used once per turn.

If the Confectance Index is greater than or equal to 3 points before using the skill, consumes 3 points of Confectance Index to enhance the skill, gaining [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Selects a tile within a cross-shaped area of 5 tiles and lands on it. Applies [effect:b9073189-1cd1-448b-a919-1643318ef423] to the nearest enemy target within 7 tiles for 1 turn and deals Physical damage equal to 30% of attack. This can be used once per turn.

If the Confectance Index is greater than or equal to 3 points before using the skill, consumes 3 points of Confectance Index to enhance the skill, gaining [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Range is increased by 2 tiles.

skills.name: Hunting Strategy
skills.description:
Deals 80% of attack as Electric damage to all enemy targets within 5 tiles, applying [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] for 1 turn, and creating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles that lasts for 3 turns, whilst gaining the [effect:60819a58-6e32-4440-9b36-1045701af14d|doll:lenna] effect for 3 turns.

If Confectance Index is more than or equal to 3 points before the skill is activated, consumes 3 points of Confectance Index to enhance the skill, gaining the [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0|doll:lenna] effect for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
Deals 80% of attack as Electric damage to all enemy targets within 7 tiles, applying [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] and 2 random debuffs for 1 turn, and creating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles that lasts for 3 turns, whilst gaining the [effect:60819a58-6e32-4440-9b36-1045701af14d|doll:lenna] effect for 3 turns.

If Confectance Index is more than or equal to 3 points before the skill is activated, consumes 3 points of Confectance Index to enhance the skill, gaining the [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0|doll:lenna] effect for 1 turn.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
Deals 80% of attack as Electric damage to all enemy targets within 7 tiles, applying [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] and 2 random debuffs for 1 turn, and creating [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tiles that lasts for 3 turns, whilst gaining the [effect:60819a58-6e32-4440-9b36-1045701af14d|doll:lenna] effect for 3 turns.

If Confectance Index is more than or equal to 3 points before the skill is activated, consumes 3 points of Confectance Index to enhance the skill, gaining the [effect:2e05ac13-430b-4a4d-b584-f669546d7fd0|doll:lenna] effect for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Increases effective range by 2 tiles, and inflicts 2 random debuffs on the target for 1 turn.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:60819a58-6e32-4440-9b36-1045701af14d] has a new effect: At the end of each action, the Confectance Index is fully replenished, and skills are enhanced without expending Confectance Index. Consuming Confectance Index makes the attack deal 20% more damage.

keys.effect: When the user's deals targeted damage, applies [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] on the target for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered up to twice per turn.

After using active skill Hunting Strategy, gain [effect:0650c1b5-4391-4985-916f-c47363843f36|doll:lenna] for 3 turns.

After using active skill Leaping Pursuit, increase the damage multiplier of the next active skill used during [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb] by 100%.

For every 1 point of Confectance Index consumed during this turn, increase attack by 5%, up to a maximum of 30%.
When attacking an enemy that is afflicted with [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] but immune to [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887], ignore 15% of its defense.
When the active skill Wild Extinction results in a kill, gain 2 points of Confectance Index.
When applying [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d], changes 1 random buff on the enemy to a random debuff.
When using Leaping Pursuit, applies [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] to the closest 2 enemy units within a 5 tiles around self for 1 turn.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 4 - I Need More Power

keys.effect: When an enemy target with Electric debuff dies, gain 1 point of Confectance Index.

If an attack causes this unit to enter Stability Break, applies [effect:8cfe89a9-404a-42e5-9cc7-5bf57b070887] to all enemy targets within 5 tiles for 1 turn. This effect can be triggered 1 time per battle.

vertebrae.effect: Accumulate and consume 3 points of Confectance Index to reduce the skill cooldown by 1 turn.

doll.name: Lenna
doll.effects: A cheerful and friendly Doll that devotes all her energy to protecting her beloved family. As Lenna becomes more composed, she displays a perfect smile when communicating with others and even gives "forced" hugs to her family.

imagoforms.effect: For every instance of Electric damage dealt by this unit, Electric damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 1%, maximum of 3%. Does not stack.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Electric damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt by all allied units is increased by 4%, maximum of 3 stacks. The effect's potency is progressively reduced by 1% each time a new stack is applied.
Attack and max HP is increased by 4%.
At the start of the battle, the 2 allied units with the highest attack have their attack increased by 3%. Does not stack.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

When an enemy within 5 tiles is attacked, apply [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] to that enemy for 1 turn before damage is dealt. This effect cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"5b60957e-de16-49e6-9b1b-2756064367b3","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

When an enemy within 5 tiles is attacked, apply [effect:d4fd8953-92c9-4830-ad8b-ac4d56d95b7d] to that enemy for 1 turn before damage is dealt. At the end of Lenna's action, recovers Confectance Index fully. Skills no longer need to consume Confectance Index in order to be enhanced. Instead, when Confectance Index is consumed, increases damage dealt by 20% This effect cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}

Increases the stability damage dealt by all Electric-type allies by 3 points. When [effect:a9d5e1de-1be0-41d0-8970-2290e5ea4623] is triggered, the fixed damage dealt is doubled. When [effect:d63f94c1-d638-4437-8196-f9cb9705c834] tile reaction is triggered, gain [effect:0aebdc30-c7a2-41ff-bdea-d80d2e53563a] for 2 turns.
